description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages Pre testes, Build CI, Release CI, Builds, Testes, Release das imagens, and Implantação, using the default image registry.gitlab.com/radar-parlamentar/radar/ci:latest and a global docker:19.03.5-dind service. In the Build CI stage add a "Build da Imagem de CI" job that runs a before_script "apk add --update bash git", uses the docker:stable image, triggers only on changes to scripts/ci/00_ci_build.sh, scripts/ci/01_ci_release.sh, and scripts/dockerfiles/CI, and executes "bash scripts/ci/run_ci.sh ci_build". In the Builds stage add "Imagem de Teste" and "Imagem do Nginx" jobs that run "bash scripts/ci/run_ci.sh teste_build" and "bash scripts/ci/run_ci.sh nginx_build" respectively. In the Pre testes stage add "Linter: Shellcheck" running "bash scripts/ci/run_ci.sh linter shellcheck" and "Migrations alteradas manualmente" running "bash scripts/ci/run_ci.sh testa_migrations_modificadas_manualmente". In the Testes stage add "Migrations" and "Suite de testes Python" jobs that use docker:dind and postgres:latest services, set DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375/, POSTGRES_DB=radar, POSTGRES_PASSWORD=radar, POSTGRES_USER=radar, and run "bash scripts/ci/run_ci.sh testa_migrations_esquecidas" and "bash scripts/ci/run_ci.sh testa_aplicacao" respectively. In the Release das imagens stage add "Principal" (only on master) running "bash scripts/ci/run_ci.sh producao_release" and "nginx" (only on master) running "bash scripts/ci/run_ci.sh nginx_release"; in the Release CI stage add "Release da Imagem de CI" with a before_script "apk add --update bash git", docker:stable image, triggers on the same changes plus master, running "bash scripts/ci/run_ci.sh ci_release"; finally, in the Implantação stage add an "Implantação" job limited to master, setting environment production and executing "bash scripts/ci/run_ci.sh implantacao".
